mapper.select: SELECT available_balance FROM wallets WHERE user_id = #{userId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE wallets SET available_balance = available_balance + #{amount}, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT status FROM escrows WHERE work_case_id = #{workCaseId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO escrows (work_case_id, amount, status, held_at) VALUES (#{workCaseId}, #{amount}, 'HELD', NOW(6))
mapper.update: UPDATE escrows SET status = 'HELD', held_at = NOW(6), updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE work_case_id = #{workCaseId} AND status = 'UNFUNDED'
UPDATE escrows SET status = 'RELEASED', released_at = NOW(6), updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE work_case_id = #{workCaseId} AND status = 'HELD'
mapper.select: SELECT amount FROM escrows WHERE work_case_id = #{workCaseId} AND status = 'HELD'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wallet_transactions ( wallet_id, work_case_id, transaction_type, amount, available_before, available_after, locked_before, locked_after, reference_type, reference_id, idempotency_key ) VALUES ( #{walletId}, #{workCaseId}, #{transactionType}, #{amount}, #{availableBefore}, #{availableAfter}, #{lockedBefore}, #{lockedAfter}, #{referenceType}, #{referenceId}, #{idempotencyKey} )
